testimonials.title: What Subscribers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people using Homemade every week.

items.quote: Our kids actually eat the meals. The portions are perfect and we save hours every week.
I stopped skipping lunch and ordering takeout. The protein options are solid and consistent.
We wanted more plant-based meals without going fully vegan. These are flavorful and filling.
Reliable, home-style meals that are easy to heat up. Exactly what I needed after a busy week.
Great variety, no food waste, and the delivery window is always on time.
I can finally keep my weekdays clean. The meals are fresh and taste like real food.
Less stress at dinner time. We just heat, plate, and enjoy.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about meal subscriptions. Can't find your answer? Contact us directly.

items.question: What’s included in a subscription?
items.answer: Fresh, chef-made meals delivered weekly. You choose your plan, portions, and meal preferences.

items.question: Can I pause or skip weeks?
items.answer: Yes. You can pause, skip, or change your plan before the weekly cutoff.

items.question: Do you support dietary preferences?
items.answer: We offer vegetarian, plant-forward, and protein-focused options, plus allergen-friendly selections.

items.question: How do portions work?
items.answer: Choose 2–4 portions per meal, or individual meals if you’re ordering for one.

items.question: When do you deliver?
items.answer: We deliver on fixed weekly routes by area. You’ll see available days at checkout.

items.question: How far in advance do I need to order?
items.answer: Orders close 3–4 days before delivery so chefs can prep fresh meals.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. Cancel or pause your subscription from your account with no long-term commitment.

items.question: Are meals fresh or frozen?
items.answer: Meals are delivered fresh and are designed for easy reheating.
